mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FFG_TX_DATA ( TX_ID, BANK_CODE, TX_CHANNEL, TX_TYPE, TX_AMOUNT, TX_DATETIME, TX_COUNTRY, TX_LOCATION, DEVICE_TYPE, DEVICE_OS, DEVICE_ID, IP_ADDRESS, FRAUD_SCORE, REGDTE, USER_ID ) VALUES ( FFG_TX_DATA_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{bankCode}, #{txChannel}, #{txType}, #{txAmount}, TO_DATE(#{txDatetime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI'), #{txCountry}, #{txLocation}, #{deviceType}, #{deviceOs}, #{deviceId}, #{ipAddress}, 0, SYSDATE, #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TX_ID AS txId, USER_ID AS userId, BANK_CODE AS bankCode, TX_TYPE AS txType, TX_AMOUNT AS txAmount, TO_CHAR(TX_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS txDatetime FROM FFG_TX_DATA ORDER BY TX_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10
